summary: Tested Attendance Module pagination feature. All 11 test cases passed: pagination controls visible, accurate record display text, rows per page selector (10/25/50), Previous button disabled on page 1, Next/Previous navigation, page reset on filter/reset/rows change, pagination hidden when no records, existing features unaffected.

features_tested.pagination_controls_visible: PASS - Pagination container with data-testid='attendance-pagination' visible below table when records exist
features_tested.showing_x_y_of_z_text: PASS - Shows 'Showing 1–10 of 34 records' format correctly
features_tested.rows_per_page_selector: PASS - Dropdown with 10, 25, 50 options available and functional
features_tested.previous_button_disabled_page_1: PASS - Previous button is disabled when on page 1
features_tested.next_button_navigation: PASS - Clicking Next navigates to page 2, updates display to 'Showing 11–20 of 34 records'
features_tested.previous_button_navigation: PASS - Clicking Previous navigates back to page 1
features_tested.page_reset_on_apply_filter: PASS - Page resets to 1 when Apply Filter is clicked (tested from page 3)
features_tested.page_reset_on_reset: PASS - Page resets to 1 when Reset button is clicked
features_tested.page_reset_on_rows_change: PASS - Page resets to 1 when rows per page is changed (tested 10→25→50→10)
features_tested.pagination_hidden_no_records: PASS - Pagination container hidden when no records found, 'No attendance records found' message displayed
features_tested.existing_features_unaffected: PASS - All filters (department, team, status, search), sort, and table layout working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Pagination implementation is clean with proper state management (currentPage, rowsPerPage)
Computed values (totalRecords, totalPages, startIndex, endIndex, paginatedAttendance) are correctly calculated
safeCurrentPage ensures page doesn't exceed totalPages when data changes
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 34 attendance records for 24-03-2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance pagination fully functional: (1) Shows 'Showing X-Y of Z records' and 'Page N of M', (2) Rows per page dropdown with 10/25/50 options, (3) Previous disabled on page 1, Next disabled on last page, (4) Page resets to 1 on filter/reset/rows change, (5) Pagination hidden when no records. Test data: 34 records on 24-03-2026 = 4 pages with 10 rows per page.
